title: Create: Twistermill
description: Bridging Weather2 wind mechanics with the Create Mod kinetic system. Build self aligning windturbines and harness dynamic wind to power Create machines and its Addons.
body:
# Create: Twistermill 

Twistermill adds custom windmill and wind vane bearings to extend the Create Mod with dynamic wind-based mechanics powered by Weather2.

![Twistermill title picture, wind direction alligned wind turbine with a contraption-on-contraption setup. Wind simulation powerd by weather2 (Tornado and Storms mod). Kinetic wind harnessed power compatible with create:newage mod, flux networks etc. Valkyrienskies 2 contraptions and create: interactive used for 120degree blade offset and pitch variations.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/189ce4dd06813382580c652d2e3cbda025e5b680.jpeg)# Create: Twistermill 

 

Use Create Interactive (1.2.1) to build wind-oriented turbines (contraption-on-contraption), control bound angle servos via redstone links to pitch rotor blades for maximum torque (SU), with lots of redstone configurability and extensive configuration options in Create's config menu. 


**Twistermill works without Create Interactive, but some advanced features like self-aligned wind turbines require it.**

**mandatory dependencies: Create, Weather2, Coroutil**

- https://modrinth.com/mod/create/version/mc1.20.1-6.0.7 - or newer
- https://modrinth.com/mod/weather-storms-tornadoes/version/1.20.1-2.8.3
- https://modrinth.com/mod/coroutil/version/ItZXMvy0

**optional dependencies: Create Interactive, Valkyrienskies 2, Kotlin for Forge**

- https://modrinth.com/mod/interactive/version/EScBvcOc
- https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies/version/1.20.1-forge-2.4.10
- https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge/version/4.12.0


This Create addon (unofficial) is still in development, so bugs or crashes may occur. I’m always open to feedback. More content may come in the future (more advanced recipes or ponders) — maybe not a lot, but we’ll see.


> **Thank You:** 

- Simibubi (Create mod) 
- Corosus (Weather2/Coroutil mods)
